title: sesleria varia var. albicans
intro: Sesleria varia var. albicans, commonly known as White Balkan Hair-grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities, offering potential health benefits for cardiovascular and immune system support. The therapeutic actions of Sesleria varia var. albicans include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immune-modulating properties, which may contribute to its potential in treating various diseases. The bioactive constituents present in Sesleria varia var. albicans include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.

side_effects: Sesleria varia var. albicans can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems.
